name: ghostfree
description: MCP server that scans your repo's dependencies for security vulnerabilities based on published CVEs.
long_description:
GhostFree is a local MCP server that scans your repository's dependencies for known vulnerabilities using OSV.dev, helps you triage and fix findings with NVD and CISA KEV enrichment, and lets you manage accepted risks — all directly from your AI coding assistant.

No installation, signup, or payment required. Run GhostFree via `npx`.

tools.name: discover_dependencies
tools.description: Scan repo manifests, return all pinned packages by ecosystem

tools.name: check_cves
tools.description: Query OSV.dev for CVEs, filter by severity, apply accepted risks

tools.name: enrich_cve
tools.description: Fetch CVSS, CWE, references from NVD + KEV exploitation status

tools.name: list_accepted_risks
tools.description: List all accepted risks with expiry status and severity snapshot

tools.name: accept_risk
tools.description: Record an accepted risk with reason, expiry date, and severity snapshot

tools.name: remove_accepted_risk
tools.description: Remove an accepted risk by UUID

prompts.name: scan
prompts.description: Run a full GhostFree security scan: discover dependencies, check for CVEs, triage findings, and manage accepted risks.

repo_path.title: Repository Path
repo_path.description: Path to the repository to scan for vulnerabilities.

nvd_api_key.title: NVD API Key (optional)
nvd_api_key.description: Optional NVD API key for higher rate limits (50 req/30s vs 5 req/30s). Get one at https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/request-an-api-key

min_severity.title: Minimum Severity (optional)
min_severity.description: Default CVE severity threshold to surface: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW. Defaults to MEDIUM if not set.

accepted_path.title: Accepted Risks File Path (optional)
accepted_path.description: Custom path for the accepted.yml file. Defaults to .ghostfree/accepted.yml in the repository root.
